results.title: Tesla Q4 2025 Deliveries: 495,570 Vehicles; Annual Total 1.79 Million
results.snippet: Tesla delivered 495,570 vehicles in Q4 2025, up 8% from Q4 2024, recovering from a weaker Q3. Full-year 2025 deliveries reached 1.79 million vehicles. Model Y remained the best-selling electric vehicle globally. Tesla also deployed 11.0 GWh of energy storage products in Q4, up 243% year-over-year, with Megapack as the primary product.

results.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v13 Launch: 7 Million Miles Autonomously Driven Per Day
results.snippet: Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) system version 13 logged over 7 million autonomous miles per day globally as of January 2026. CEO Elon Musk announced that unsupervised FSD is now available in select US cities, with broader rollout planned for mid-2026. Tesla has over 6 million vehicles in its fleet capable of FSD, representing a significant data advantage for AI training.

results.title: Tesla Energy Business Hits Inflection: Megapack Revenue Surpasses $3 Billion in 2025
results.snippet: Tesla's energy generation and storage segment generated over $3 billion in revenue in 2025, making it an increasingly significant part of Tesla's business. Megapack production at the Lathrop Gigafactory reached 40 GWh annualised capacity. Tesla also deployed 7 GW of new Supercharger stalls in 2025, expanding its network to over 65,000 stalls globally.
